reference.title: Before You Begin
reference.shortdesc: This topic lists the information, devices, and access needed before you begin setup of your managed Mac.

ul.li:
Your company email address
Example: jbob@mycompany.com
Your approved MFA method on your iPhone or other iOS device
Any onboarding instructions provided by your IT team

section.title: Security note
section.note: Do not share your company password or MFA verification code. IT will never ask for this information.
